title: coreopsis tinctoria var. atkinsoniana
intro: Coreopsis tinctoria var. atkinsoniana, also known as the American or Plumed Coreopsis, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, prized for its vibrant yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The coreopsis plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns, including digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. Coreopsis tinctoria var. atkinsoniana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to promote overall well-being.
